text:
ジェネちゃんから聞いてるよな？
各惑星のエネミーへの影響調査。
俺の用事もそれなんだ。

どんな影響を与えたのか
未知数だから余計にタチが悪いぜ……

今回の対象は、龍族だ。
ただ元から暴走しているヤツもいて
ちょっと手不足なんだ。

悪いんだけど、この龍族への
影響調査を手伝ってもらっても

I heard from Gené you were doing enemy
influence surveys on other planets.
That's what I'm working on, too.

What's even worse is that the exact TYPE of
influence we're surveying remains unknown.

This time we're studying Draconians. Some
of them are already violent by nature, so it's
hard to figure out if they're being influenced.

Sorry to ask this after I told you all the
hurdles, but do you think you could help me
do an influence survey on the Draconians?
